name: FormPilot
description: Production-grade Chrome Extension that eliminates manual form filling at scale.
//: Tailwind CSS requires 'unsafe-inline' for style injection; SheetJS/xlsx parsing requires 'wasm-unsafe-eval' for Excel operations.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'
